basics.name: Soumya Jeet Sahoo
basics.title: Software Developer
basics.summary: With hands-on experience in full-stack development, REST API integration, and ML model deployment. Passionate about writing clean, efficient code and building scalable software solutions. Eager to contribute to algorithm design, system integration, and continuous improvement as a Software Developer.

bullets: Designed & deployed responsive e-commerce web applications, improving user engagement through optimized UI/UX.
Delivered secure and scalable web apps using HTML5, CSS, JavaScript and GitHub APIs, debugged cross-browser layouts & functionality issues.
Integrated third-party APIs and libraries to extend application features: verified and tested deployments.

projects.title: TripPlanr – Collaborative Travel Planner App
bullets: Built and exposed RESTful APIs using Spring Boot to handle user sessions, destination voting, and preference aggregation — following enterprise-grade service design patterns.
Architected the MySQL relational schema and wrote optimized SQL queries to aggregate and rank group preference data across sessions, applying DBMS best practices learned in coursework.
Integrated a React.js frontend with the Spring Boot backend via REST, managing JSON payloads and HTTP status codes to ensure reliable client-server communication.

projects.title: Alzheimer’s Disease MRI Classifier
bullets: Architected an end-to-end deep learning pipeline on Google Cloud to classify four stages of Alzheimer’s disease from MRI scans, leveraging transfer learning with ResNet50, VGG19, and InceptionV3 — enabling real-time clinical inference without local GPU dependency.

Engineered a robust data preprocessing and augmentation strategy (rotation, flipping, normalization) to improve model generalization, reducing overfitting and improving cross-validation stability across all three architectures.

Deployed the best-performing model (ResNet50, 98.8% accuracy) as a browser-accessible Streamlit web application with a REST inference endpoint, demonstrating cloud-native ML serving to a non-technical audience

projects.title: Virtual Chatbot Assistant
bullets: Built a fully functional desktop chatbot in Python with a dynamic Tkinter GUI supporting both text input and real-time voice interaction via microphone.
Integrated Gemini AI API for context-aware responses, OpenWeather API for live weather queries, and Wikipedia API for on-demand knowledge retrieval within a single natural language interface.
Implemented text-to-speech output via pyttsx3 and speech-to-text input via SpeechRecognition, enabling a fully hands-free interaction mode.

achievements.title: Data Structures & Algorithms Basic to Advanced in Java (16 week course)
Career Essentials in Generative AI by Microsoft
Cybersecurity Job Simulation by JP MorganChase
